publications.title: Buffer Overflow Exploitation - OSCP Style
publications.description: Step-by-step buffer overflow exploitation guide. From basic stack overflows to advanced ROP chains for OSCP preparation. Covers Windows x86 buffer overflows, bad character detection, and shellcode generation.

publications.title: Active Directory Enumeration & Exploitation
publications.description: Comprehensive guide to Active Directory enumeration and exploitation for OSCP and beyond. Covers LDAP enumeration, Kerberoasting, AS-REP roasting, and Golden Ticket attacks.

publications.title: Linux Privilege Escalation Matrix
publications.description: Complete Linux privilege escalation guide covering SUID, sudo, kernel exploits, capabilities, cron jobs, and more. Essential for OSCP preparation.

publications.title: Web Application Penetration Testing Methodology
publications.description: Structured methodology for web application penetration testing. Covers OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, testing frameworks, and reporting.

publications.title: Windows Privilege Escalation Techniques
publications.description: Advanced Windows privilege escalation guide for OSCP and real-world engagements. Covers service misconfigurations, token manipulation, and DLL hijacking.
